title: Diabetic retinopathy screening review
source_review_basis: full authoritative documents inspected and archived; item-level retain/rewrite/remove/add comparisons recorded

assessment.text: Supports recording eligibility, attendance, prior pathway status, information sharing and coordination with primary care, diabetology, hospital eye and maternity services.
assessment.rationale: Supports eligibility, attendance and pathway coordination for diabetic eye screening review; no decision is generated.

source.title: Diabetic eye screening pathway requirements specification
source.population: People eligible for the NHS diabetic eye screening programme, including pathway-specific pregnancy and surveillance groups.
source.setting: End-to-end diabetic eye screening, grading, result communication, surveillance and referral pathways.
source.exclusions: Exact for selected screening-result, visual-acuity, image-grading, result-letter, surveillance and referral-status documentation. It does not independently interpret an individual result or apply directly to UAE screening intervals.

exact_location.heading: End-to-end pathway and information sharing
exact_location.locator: End-to-end pathway; section 1 Before screening test

source.evidence_paraphrase: Supports recording eligibility, attendance, prior pathway status, information sharing and coordination with primary care, diabetology, hospital eye and maternity services.

assessment.text: Supports recording bilateral visual acuity, image status, grading, screening outcome and result letters sent to the person and relevant clinicians.
assessment.rationale: Supports bilateral acuity, image status, grading, outcome and result communication for diabetic eye screening review; no decision is generated.

assessment.text: Supports recording clinician-confirmed surveillance, ungradable-image, digital-surveillance or hospital-eye-service referral status without autonomously assigning a grade or destination.
assessment.rationale: Supports clinician-confirmed surveillance and referral status for diabetic eye screening review; no decision is generated.
